audit_method: Constrained SLSQP maximization of D(F), using analytic gradient and Hessian-derived objective gradient.
boundary: Numerical audit only. The exact proof still requires a symbolic asymmetry/SOS/Terwilliger certificate.
name: Weighted Asymmetry Contact Lemma audit
normal_form: Equivalently, in multilevel variables, prove 24^h(a C10-b C01) <= m w S^(h-1)(a^2-b^2) on the contact surface B=0.
target: On F(theta)=0 and theta0>=theta1, prove D(F)=partial_0F-partial_1F<=0.
